metadata.purpose: Use MCST-designated cultural tourism festivals as a success/benchmark cohort against the 10,198-row national festival master.
metadata.extraction_status: official_page_metadata_captured; attachment text extraction pending because viewer/download path did not expose raw file in first probe.

official_sources.title: 세계인 사로잡은 케이-컬처 종합 체험장, 2026~2027 문화관광축제 27개 선정
2026-2027년 문화관광축제 및 예비축제 목록
captured_facts: 2026-2027년 문화관광축제 및 예비축제 목록 HWP 135KB listed

official_sources.title: 나비스 중앙부처 정책보도 mirror
captured_facts: 27개 중 20개 재지정, 7개 신규 선정 구조 확인

benchmark_logic: MCST-selected cultural tourism festivals should be treated as a benchmark cohort, not as automatic success proof.
Compare selected/reselected/new festival cohorts against MCST master fields: budget, visitor history, outsourcing, dates, region, festival type.
Use selection/reselection status as one dependent variable in success analysis; use price/crowding/procurement incidents as counter-evidence.
Global festival policy should be checked against demand dispersion: whether national attention spreads to regions or concentrates congestion in already-famous festivals.

confirmed_named_examples.name: 부산국제록페스티벌
confirmed_named_examples.use: new selection case: youth/music demand, large-event operations, sponsorship/procurement

confirmed_named_examples.name: 세종축제
confirmed_named_examples.use: new selection case: city identity and public-space operations

confirmed_named_examples.name: 인천펜타포트뮤직페스티벌
confirmed_named_examples.use: global festival case: paid music festival, crowd/safety/sponsor model

confirmed_named_examples.name: 화천산천어축제
confirmed_named_examples.use: winter global festival and demand/satisfaction benchmark

next_extraction_tasks: Resolve raw HWP/HWPX/PDF attachment download URL or use public preview text where available.
Extract full 27 cultural tourism festival names and preliminary festival names.
Join selected names to MCST 2026 master and match-key index.
Compare selected cohort against procurement queue and case dossiers.
